message:
refactor: formatting, import reorder, type annotations, and benchmark setup improvements

Formatting and minor fixes across 12 files with no behavioral changes:

- src/http/h1/http_client.rs: Add explicit return type annotation on
  poll_fn closure to help type inference.
- src/http/h1/listener.rs: Reformat CatchUnwind closure to multi-line.
- src/http/h2/connection.rs: Reorder frame imports alphabetically; reformat
  multi-line assert! macros with proper indentation.
- src/net/tcp/listener.rs: Replace static AtomicU64 test clock with
  thread_local Cell<u64> to eliminate cross-test interference when tests
  run in parallel on the same thread.
- src/net/websocket/split.rs: Add explicit tuple type annotation on
  future::zip result to help inference.
- src/runtime/reactor/{io_uring,kqueue,windows}.rs: Reorder imports to
  place std:: after crate-local imports (rustfmt canonical order).
- src/runtime/scheduler/intrusive.rs: Reformat steal_batch signature to
  multi-line for readability.
- src/runtime/state.rs: Wrap long if-let condition to fit line width.
- src/stream/throttle.rs: Reorder imports alphabetically.
- benches/tracing_overhead.rs: Hoist RuntimeState::new() and
  create_root_region() out of the benchmark iteration loop so Criterion
  measures only the target operation, not setup overhead.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
